note: Additional mutation batch after baseline 20-bug set; validated with marauders set/reset and targeted cargo tests.

variants.name: graph_neighbors_directed_skip_start_not_cleared
variants.validation_command: marauders set --path . --variant graph_neighbors_directed_skip_start_not_cleared_af1aa98_1 && cargo test -q -p petgraph neighbors_selfloops
